title: Study visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Learn about the visas you can study on while in New Zealand, and who can help you with your application.
- Visas for studying in New Zealand There are many different visas that let you study in New Zealand. You can go to school, take a short course, study for longer or do other training.

## Visas for studying in New Zealand
There are many different visas that let you study in New Zealand. You can go to school, take a short course, study for longer or do other training.
- Pathway Student Visa information A Pathway Student Visa is for international students who want to study up to 3 programmes of study, one after the other, on a single visa.

## Pathway Student Visa information
A Pathway Student Visa is for international students who want to study up to 3 programmes of study, one after the other, on a single visa.
- Getting help with your visa application If you are overseas, you can get advice from an overseas education agent about student visas as they are exempt from needing a license. Education providers in New Zealand can only give you advice if they have a licensed adviser who works there.

## Getting help with your visa application
If you are overseas, you can get advice from an overseas education agent about student visas as they are exempt from needing a license. Education providers in New Zealand can only give you advice if they have a licensed adviser who works there.
- Funds Transfer Scheme The Funds Transfer Scheme (FTS) is a secure way for students from some countries to transfer funds to support themselves while they are in New Zealand.

## Funds Transfer Scheme
The Funds Transfer Scheme (FTS) is a secure way for students from some countries to transfer funds to support themselves while they are in New Zealand.
